modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Missing reports in My Content on Cognos 11.

full_description_text: So, the user logged into Cognos and noticed that all their reports were just gone from My Content. They were really confused because they had built those reports themselves. It’s like they just vanished into thin air, and they didn’t know what happened.
short_description: Missing reports in My Content on Cognos 11.
description: So, the user logged into Cognos and noticed that all their reports were just gone from My Content. They were really confused because they had built those reports themselves. It’s like they just vanished into thin air, and they didn’t know what happened.
